rationale: Educ. Code §29.122 governs establishment of gifted and talented programs. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraisals, or revenue formulas, so the proposed Tax Code change does not conflict.
quote: Sec. 29.122. ESTABLISHMENT. (a) Using criteria established by the State Board of Education, each school district shall adopt a process for identifying and serving gifted and talented students in the district and shall establish a program for those students in each grade level.
_note: No direct conflict. Indirect fiscal impact on school district revenue is possible but not addressed by this statute.
